subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! Thou seest one imprisoned in Thy name and thereafter treading Thy path. By Thy might, O Beloved of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری من سجن باسمک و بعد فی سبیلک فو عزتک یا محبوب العالمین و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
